achievements.name: Will To Resist
achievements.flavorText: Because "everyone’s doing it" doesn’t make it right

achievements.name: Nine-to-Five
achievements.flavorText: Just another day in the office...

achievements.name: Artificial Avarice
achievements.flavorText: "Good" is good enough.

achievements.name: Chief Executive Ordinance
achievements.flavorText: Ya know cause he's… You get it

achievements.name: Bubble Popper
achievements.flavorText: Sometimes once isn't enough'

achievements.name: A Year's Leave
achievements.flavorText: You've earned a vacation!
achievements.description: Have a total of 365 Tokens accrued at once.

achievements.name: Vertical Mobility
achievements.flavorText: Moving up in the world

achievements.name: Above and Beyond
achievements.flavorText: You'll be getting a glowing review.
achievements.description: Max out the style meter once.

achievements.name: Catastrophic Creativity
achievements.flavorText: Who’d have thought there’d be so many ways to cause such carnage.
achievements.description: Use every weapon at least once.

achievements.name: Crunch Culture
achievements.flavorText: The boss wanted this done yesterday, literally.

achievements.name: Consumerism
achievements.flavorText: Won't somebody please think of the economy.

achievements.name: Natural Stupidity
achievements.flavorText: Artifical Intelligence has nothing on Natural Stupidity
achievements.description: Beat the game using only the Stapler for an entire run

achievements.name: Unused Benefits Package
achievements.flavorText: Unused Benefits don't rollover.
achievements.description: Beat an entire level without using any form of healing.

achievements.name: Overqualified
achievements.flavorText: Are you sure this is the job you want?
achievements.description: Reach the maximum rank on the style meter and maintain it for an entire level.

achievements.name: On the Dot
achievements.flavorText: No time to dawdle!
achievements.description: Beat the game in under X minutes.

achievements.name: Head 2 Head
achievements.flavorText: Give him a taste of his own medicine.
achievements.description: Beat Dr. Elfir using Dr.Elfir's Head

achievements.name: Rocks, Stones, and…
achievements.flavorText: Just another Brick in the Wall.

achievements.name: Dumb as a Brick
achievements.flavorText: The Ai isn't very intelligent.

achievements.name: Masonry
achievements.flavorText: The only way to get a house in this economy.

achievements.name: Legume Waster
achievements.flavorText: A Bountiful Harvest.

achievements.name: Casserole
achievements.flavorText: Use every part of the crop in this lovely dish.

achievements.name: Avenging the Cow
achievements.flavorText: Jack wasted the beanstalk in the sotry, right?

achievements.name: Bouncing off the Walls
achievements.flavorText: Even the Roombas are being replaced.

achievements.name: Cleaning House
achievements.flavorText: You could eat off these floors.

achievements.name: Full Tour
achievements.flavorText: Nowhere they haven't gone.

achievements.name: Sentry Buster
achievements.flavorText: Hope they don't miss their toys.

achievements.name: Decommissioner
achievements.flavorText: They should probably recall the whole line

achievements.name: TURRETing Test
achievements.flavorText: Its okay the turrets can't hurt you, its part of the test.

achievements.name: Extra Fingers
achievements.flavorText: Aren't hands only supposed to have 5 of those.

achievements.name: Glazing
achievements.flavorText: Your work is so spectacular it can't be coppied.

achievements.name: Human Element
achievements.flavorText: There is something about your work they could never hope ot copy.

achievements.name: Macros
achievements.flavorText: The mouse moves without the employee.

achievements.name: Assorted Cheeses
achievements.flavorText: Keep up the Gooda work.

achievements.name: Rat Race
achievements.flavorText: Only the Big Cheese comes out on top.
